description: Search MusicBrainz artists, releases, works, labels; resolve ISRC/ISWC/barcode; fetch cover art.
name: io.github.cyanheads/musicbrainz-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Contact (email or URL) embedded in the mandatory descriptive MusicBrainz User-Agent. Not start-blocking — the server ships a default contact — but operators running a shared or hosted instance should set their own so MusicBrainz can reach them about traffic.
environmentVariables.name: MUSICBRAINZ_CONTACT

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
